penalties.description: A required hand exchange between throws was clearly missed.
The knot slipped slightly under tension.

reasoning: The start and end timing are observable. A hand-switch error was noted, and there was minor knot slippage. The field of view was generally clear, but a few steps were slightly out of frame, influencing accuracy.
